study_title: Ooceraea biroi infection RNA-seq
exp_title: RNAseq of Ooceraea biroi Brain when infected with nemotodes
design: Brains or PPGs of 5 workers were pooled to produce 4 samples per tissue type. RNA was extracted from each sample using a Trizol-chloroform protocol. Libraries were prepared using a KAPA stranded RNA-sequencing kit following the manufacturers protocol. Libraries were sequenced using standard protocols on an Illumina HiSeq 4000.

study_title: Ooceraea biroi Epigenomics
exp_title: C_Biroi_methylome_107
design: Samples were collected onto dry ice immersed in ethanol (98%v/v) and kept frozen at -80°C until dissection. Dissection was performed at 4°C in PBS. RNA was extracted using Trizol followed by column purification. Total RNA was quantified using a Bioanalyzer. Libraries were prepared using the Clontech SMARTer Kit. Multiple libraries were pooled into each flow cell. Sequencing was performed using the Illumina HiSeq2000 platform, for 100 bp paired-end eads.

design: Samples were collected onto dry ice immersed in ethanol (98%v/v) and kept frozen at -80°C until dissection. Dissection was performed at 4°C in PBS. RNA was extracted using Trizol followed by column purification. Total RNA was quantified using a Bioanalyzer. Libraries were prepared using the Clontech SMARTer Kit. Multiple libraries were pooled into each flow cell. Sequencing was performed using the Illumina HiSeq2000 platform, for 100 bp reads.

Multiple libraries were pooled into each flow cell. Sequencing was performed using the Illumina HiSeq2000 platform, for 100 bp reads.

study_title: Ooceraea biroi infection RNA-seq
exp_title: RNAseq of Ooceraea biroi Post-pharyngeal gland when not-infected with nemotodes
design: Brains or PPGs of 5 workers were pooled to produce 4 samples per tissue type. RNA was extracted from each sample using a Trizol-chloroform protocol. Libraries were prepared using a KAPA stranded RNA-sequencing kit following the manufacturers protocol. Libraries were sequenced using standard protocols on an Illumina HiSeq 4000.

study_title: Ooceraea biroi DNMT1 frameshift mutant RNA sequencing
exp_title: RNA-seq of Ooceraea biroi: Adult whole ant
design: RNA was extracted and eluted in 30 l  RNAse free water from frozen whole ants using QIAGENs RNeasy Mini Kit. 1 ng of total RNA was used to generate full length cDNA using Clontechs SMART-Seq v4 Ultra Low Input RNA Kit. 1 ng of cDNA was then used to prepare libraries using the Illumina Nextera XT DNA sample preparation kit. Libraries with unique barcodes were pooled at equal molar ratios and sequenced on an Illumina NextSeq 500 sequencer to generate 150 bp paired-end reads, following the manufacturers protocol.
lab: LABORATORY OF SOCIAL EVOLUTION AND BEHAVIOR

study_title: Comparative development of the ant chemosensory system
exp_title: RNA-seq of antennae from developing clonal raider ant pupae
design: Pupae were syncronized by checking prepupae every 4hrs and seperating all newly transition pupae. Pupae were then aged 0-14 days before antennae were dissected and flash frozen. RNA was extracted with the Trizol reagent and Phaselock columns, then cleaned with the QIAGEN RNEasy kit before being sent to the Rockefeller University Genomics Core Facility for library prep and sequencing
lab: Laboratory of Social Evolution and Behavior
